2604.13846.title: Beyond Static Personas: Situational Personality Steering for Large Language Models
2604.13846.paper_summary: Personalized Large Language Models (LLMs) facilitate more natural, human-like interactions in human-centric applications. However, existing personalization methods are constrained by limited controllability and high resource demands. Furthermore, their reliance on static personality modeling restricts adaptability across varying situations. To address these limitations, we first demonstrate the existence of situation-dependency and consistent situation-behavior patterns within LLM personalities through a multi-perspective analysis of persona neurons. Building on these insights, we propose IRIS, a training-free, neuron-based Identify-Retrieve-Steer framework for advanced situational personality steering. Our approach comprises situational persona neuron identification, situation-aware neuron retrieval, and similarity-weighted steering. We empirically validate our framework on PersonalityBench and our newly introduced SPBench, a comprehensive situational personality benchmark. Experimental results show that our method surpasses best-performing baselines, demonstrating IRIS's generalization and robustness to complex, unseen situations and different models architecture.
2604.13846.paper_summary_zh: 個性化的大型語言模型（LLMs）促進了在人性化應用中更自然、類人化的互動。然而，現有的個性化方法受到有限可控性和高資源需求的限制。此外，它們對靜態個性建模的依賴限制了在不同情境下的適應能力。為了解決這些限制，我們首先通過對個性神經元的多角度分析，展示了情境依賴性和一致的情境-行為模式在LLM個性中的存在。基於這些見解，我們提出了IRIS，一種無需訓練的基於神經元的識別-檢索-引導框架，用於先進的情境個性引導。我們的方法包括情境個性神經元識別、情境感知神經元檢索和相似性加權引導。我們在PersonalityBench和我們新引入的SPBench（一個全面的情境個性基準）上實證驗證了我們的框架。實驗結果顯示，我們的方法超越了最佳性能的基準，展示了IRIS在複雜、未見情境和不同模型架構下的泛化能力和穩健性。
2604.13846.author: Zesheng Wei et.al.
2604.13846.authors: Zesheng Wei, Mengxiang Li, Zilei Wang, Yang Deng
